mapper.sql: su.id id, su.menu_id menu_id, su.child_menu_id child_menu_id, su.name_add name_add, su.name_edit name_edit, su.name_delete name_delete, su.name_query name_query, su.sys_user_id sys_user_id, su.role_manage_id role_manage_id, su.create_time create_time
mapper.insert: insert into permission_menu ( menu_id, child_menu_id, name_add, name_edit, name_delete, name_query, sys_user_id, role_manage_id, create_time ) values ( #{menu_id}, #{child_menu_id}, #{name_add}, #{name_edit}, #{name_delete}, #{name_query}, #{sys_user_id}, #{role_manage_id}, now() )
